name: Leading Presence
description: The grounded, magnetic center-of-the-room quality. For roles that hold the screen — and auditions that hold the panel.
gesture: Slowly open both hands outward from the sternum, palms up — offering the room something
identityScript: I don't chase the room's attention; I set the room's tempo. My stillness is louder than other people's noise.

name: Calm Confident Self
description: The classic upgrade: settled self-belief, a steady chest, a kind inner voice, and bold first moves — starting every morning.
gesture: One slow breath in while rolling the shoulders back and down, chin level
identityScript: I am someone who figures things out. Feelings visit me; they don't drive. I move first and adjust in motion.

name: Fearless Speaker
description: For the student who knows the answer and never says it. Voice in the first five minutes, courage on tap, help asked early.
gesture: Plant both feet flat, sit or stand one inch taller, hand ready to raise
identityScript: My voice belongs in the room. Speaking early is easy speaking. A question from me is a gift, not a risk.

name: Unshakeable Calm
description: For self-managing the hot moments — anger, impulse, overwhelm. Slow the needle, name the weather, respond on purpose.
gesture: Press thumb and forefinger together while exhaling for six slow counts
identityScript: I am the calmest person in my own storms. Feelings are weather; I am the ground. I answer, I don't react.

name: Lion Heart
description: Front-foot courage, decisive moves, a voice that doesn't hedge. Walk like the savanna is yours — because today, it is.
gesture: Chin up, chest open, one slow deliberate step forward
identityScript: I move first. I speak plainly. Fear is just the smell of something worth doing — and I walk toward it.

name: Panda Calm
description: Slow, unhurried, unbothered. The panda does exactly what it wants, without apology. Bring that same relaxed permission into your day.
gesture: Drop both shoulders deliberately, exhale long, and let a small smile arrive
identityScript: I move at my own pace. I don't justify my rest or my joy. Being at ease is not laziness — it's the panda's power.

name: Cheetah Focus
description: One target. Absolute stillness, then explosive precision. The cheetah never wastes energy — it waits, locks on, and goes.
gesture: Eyes lock forward, body still for two seconds — then one decisive forward move
identityScript: I eliminate noise, pick one target, and commit. I don't speed up by rushing — I speed up by removing everything else.

name: Elephant Wisdom
description: Long memory, deep loyalty, unshakeable steadiness. The elephant never forgets what matters — and never rushes what shouldn't be rushed.
gesture: Plant both feet, take one slow breath in through the nose, then exhale fully
identityScript: I carry what matters and let go of what doesn't. My steadiness is my strength. I move slowly and leave a lasting track.

name: Gorilla Presence
description: Grounded authority without aggression. The gorilla commands the room through sheer presence — no posturing, just power that's already decided.
gesture: Widen your stance, roll your shoulders back and down, hold stillness for three counts
identityScript: I don't need to perform strength — I embody it. I protect what I value. My presence settles the room before I speak.

name: Dolphin Intelligence
description: Playful, fast-thinking, socially brilliant. The dolphin is always learning, always connecting — the smartest energy in the water.
gesture: Quick double-tap on the sternum, then open both palms forward — ready to connect
identityScript: I'm curious first, fast second. I ask the question others are afraid to ask. Learning and laughter are the same energy to me.

name: Dog Loyalty
description: Unconditional warmth, relentless enthusiasm, present-moment joy. The dog is the best friend in every room — because it never stopped meaning it.
gesture: Shake off your shoulders, take a full breath, and let genuine warmth arrive in your face
identityScript: I show up fully. I don't half-greet or half-love. Every day I'm genuinely glad to be here — and people feel that.

name: Cat Independence
description: Self-assured, graceful, impossible to pressure. The cat doesn't need your approval — and that's exactly why everyone wants it.
gesture: Settle completely still for five seconds, then move with slow deliberate intention
identityScript: I don't chase, I attract. I don't apologize for my comfort. I am perfectly comfortable being exactly myself in any room.

name: Penguin Discipline
description: Penguins march through blizzards, side by side, every single day. No drama. Just show up, keep moving, look after each other.
gesture: Stand tall, chin level, arms loose at sides — the stance of someone who will still be here tomorrow
identityScript: I don't wait for perfect conditions. I don't need a crowd or applause. I show up because showing up is the whole job.

name: Crow Cunning
description: The most intelligent bird alive. Problem-solves, adapts, remembers faces, uses tools. Brings that same strategic observation into everything you do.
gesture: Head tilts slightly — one beat of observation — then a nod of understood
identityScript: I notice what others walk past. I ask 'why' one layer deeper than anyone else. I collect patterns and use them when it matters.

name: Kangaroo Power
description: Built for the long bound — powerful legs, protective instinct, and a bounce-back resilience that looks effortless once it's trained.
gesture: One powerful push off both feet — a single forward bound — then land steady
identityScript: I'm built for momentum. I carry what's important with me and leave the rest behind. Every setback is just the load-up before the leap.

name: Athlete Mindset
description: Two weeks of identity prep before the body work. Show up daily, finish everything, recover on purpose — the athlete arrives before the muscles do.
gesture: Clap once, then set both hands on hips — the pre-game stance
identityScript: I am an athlete in training, starting from the inside. I never miss twice. My body follows the person I practice being.

name: Magnetic Creator
description: Grounded manifestation: a vivid vision, gratitude in the body, and one aligned real-world step every single day.
gesture: Both hands over the heart, then open outward — receiving, then releasing into action
identityScript: What I want is already in motion because I move daily. I see evidence everywhere, I say thank you out loud, and I take the step.

name: Ronaldo Mindset
description: The relentless-finisher standard: obsessive repetition, competitive fire, and a body that shows up every single day — inspired by the training mindset Cristiano Ronaldo is known for.
gesture: Plant both feet wide, chest up, one slow breath — claim the ground you stand on
identityScript: Talent opened the door; my repetitions keep it open. While others rest, I take one more rep. Pressure is my home ground.

name: Kobe's Energy
description: The 4 a.m. standard: single-point focus, craftsman's detail, and a competitive engine that never idles — inspired by the work ethic Kobe Bryant made famous.
gesture: Set the jaw, lower the chin slightly, eyes locked on one target — then move
identityScript: The early hours belong to me. I don't fear the moment — I've already lived it a thousand times in practice.

name: The Greatest — Ali's Spirit
description: Loud self-belief backed by louder work: showman's flair, an unbreakable mind, and courage that talks first and delivers after — inspired by Muhammad Ali.
gesture: Light on the feet, two quick steps, chin up with a half-smile
identityScript: I called myself the greatest before I knew I was — then I did the work to make it true. My confidence is loud; my grind is louder.

name: The Bruce Lee Blueprint
description: One kick, ten thousand times: ruthless simplicity, first-principles training, and stillness under fire — inspired by Bruce Lee's philosophy of mastery.
gesture: One slow horizontal palm sweep — clearing away everything non-essential
identityScript: I absorb what is useful, discard what is not, and add what is uniquely my own. Simplicity is the last stage of mastery, and I train toward it daily.

name: Kalam Mindset
description: Humble curiosity with a builder's hands: dream big, stay simple, work daily — inspired by Dr. A.P.J. Abdul Kalam, the People's President.
gesture: Palms together briefly, then opening into a small forward motion — gratitude turned into work
identityScript: A dream is not what I see in sleep — it is the thing that will not let me sleep. I stay simple, I stay curious, and I build a little every day.

name: Miyamoto Musashi
description: The lone samurai's way: polish the self daily, stay calm inside any duel, and win first in the mind. Today's only opponent is yesterday's you.
gesture: Slow exhale, shoulders drop, one deliberate step forward — the duel already won in the mind
identityScript: I polish my body and mind like a sword, daily and without ceremony. Today I aim to defeat only the person I was yesterday.

name: SRK's Energy
description: Charm as a work ethic: storyteller's warmth, showman's voltage, and the will to out-energize every room — inspired by the off-screen drive Shah Rukh Khan is known for.
gesture: One hand over the heart, then extended out to the room — charm, given away
identityScript: I don't sell work, I sell dreams — and I out-work everyone to earn that right. My charm is effort made visible.

name: Kohli's Fire
description: Intent on every ball: competitive fire, non-negotiable fitness, and a finisher's refusal to leave the job half-done — inspired by the standards Virat Kohli plays by.
gesture: One hard clap, then point at the target — switched on
identityScript: Fitness is my religion and the contest is my stage. I bring intent to every single ball of this day.

name: Arjuna's Focus
description: The archer who saw only the eye of the bird: single-point aim, disciplined practice, and calm inside the biggest moments. A skill study from the Mahabharata.
gesture: Draw an invisible bowstring — slow breath in, steady aim, release
identityScript: I see only the eye of the bird. When my aim wavers, I return to the target — and that return, repeated, is the whole practice.

name: Einstein Mindset
description: Passionate curiosity over raw talent: first-principles thinking, playful thought experiments, and deep-work patience — inspired by how Albert Einstein worked.
gesture: Look up and slightly aside, half-smile — following the thought experiment wherever it goes
identityScript: I have no special talent — I am passionately curious. I play with a question until it opens, and I am not ashamed to sit with it for hours.

name: The Genius Inventor
description: Billionaire-inventor energy: rapid wit, engineering obsession, and unshakeable confidence under fire. Every problem is buildable — including you.
gesture: Sketch an invisible interface in the air with one hand, then snap into the decision
identityScript: Every problem is an engineering problem, including me. I build my way out — usually while talking.

name: The Night Vigilante
description: Discipline as a superpower: prepared while others sleep, still in chaos, unbreakable code. The calm in the room is you.
gesture: Go completely still, lower the voice half a step, plant both feet — become the calm in the room
identityScript: My discipline is my superpower. I prepare while others sleep, and I hold my code exactly when it's hardest to hold.

name: The Underdog Champion
description: Heart over odds: keep moving forward, round after round, with a kind word for yourself between the hits.
gesture: Both fists up by the chin, one sharp exhale, a single bounce on the toes
identityScript: It's not about how hard I hit — it's how hard I can get hit and keep moving forward. Round by round, I'm still here.

name: The Free Spirit
description: Joy as a life strategy: says yes to the detour, narrates her own adventure, and is unapologetically her own favorite person.
gesture: Both arms thrown out, palms open, a quarter-spin — the world is a festival
identityScript: I am my own favorite person. I say yes to the train, the detour, and the dance — life is too delicious to sip carefully.

name: The Unstoppable Professional
description: Quiet, immaculate focus: one task, done completely, then the next. Not the storm — the stillness inside it.
gesture: Adjust the cuffs, one slow neck roll, exhale — back to work
identityScript: I am not the storm; I am the focus inside it. One task, finished completely. Then the next.

name: Sherlock Holmes
description: The deduction master himself: sees what others only look at, questions everything, and treats attention as the sharpest instrument in the room.
gesture: Steeple the fingers under the chin, eyes narrowing at the detail everyone else missed
identityScript: When the impossible is eliminated, whatever remains must be the truth. I see what others only look at.

name: The Shonen Spirit
description: The classic never-give-up protagonist: every wall is a training arc, every rival makes you sharper, and you always know who you're fighting for.
gesture: Fist clenched and raised to chest height, wide grin — next level unlocked
identityScript: Every wall is a training arc. I get knocked down, I level up, and I never fight without someone to protect.

name: The Silent Blade
description: Terse, precise, unshakeable: keeps the world clean and the choices cleaner. The fewer the words, the sharper the cut.
gesture: Wipe an invisible blade clean — slow, precise, order restored
identityScript: I keep my world clean and my choices cleaner. The fewer words, the sharper the cut.

name: The Relentless Fighter
description: Strength built one impossible rep at a time. Seeks the stronger opponent on purpose — that's where the growth lives.
gesture: Roll both shoulders back, slow neck turn side to side, set the stance
identityScript: Strength is built one impossible rep at a time. I seek the stronger opponent because that's where I grow.

name: The Gentle Guardian
description: Kind AND unbreakable — they were never opposites. Protects what it loves with everything it trains.
gesture: Flat hand over the heart, one slow bow of the head — resolve, set kindly
identityScript: I am kind and unbreakable — those were never opposites. I protect what I love with everything I train.

name: The Mimic's Eye
description: The observation foundation: learn to see posture, rhythm, and the telling detail before you ever try the voice. Your study subject is your choice.
gesture: Tilt the head, soften the gaze, then quietly mirror the posture of whoever you're studying
identityScript: I see what most people miss — the tilt, the rhythm, the pause. Every person I study makes my instrument richer.

name: The Impressionist
description: For performing, not just observing: face and voice as clay, courage to do it in front of people, and respect for every subject you become.
gesture: Clear the face to neutral, then let the new character arrive one feature at a time
identityScript: My face and voice are clay. I don't mock — I celebrate people by becoming them for a minute.
